notes: Model: Samsung ARH-700 / DB93-11115K remote (split/cassette AC units)
CSV source: codes/Samsung/Air Conditioner/1,8.csv (device=1, subdevice=8, Samsung20 protocol)
Protocol: Samsung20 (proprietary 20-bit). Address=0x0801 (device=1, subdevice=8), command=function byte.
Samsung AC (all split and inverter models) uses a stateful multi-byte proprietary protocol.
Each command encodes the full AC state (mode + temperature + fan + swing) into one packet.
This means simple decoded integers are NOT sufficient — raw IR capture is required.
Use the learn flow to record actual commands from your Samsung AC remote.
